query: brachytherapy complications incidence prevention management board review

results.title: Review of brachytherapy complications - Upper gastrointestinal tract.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 33358330. 2021/09/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Some investigators have reported severe rectal complications after 
brachytherapy. Due to the low number of such events, their relationship to 
dosimetric parameters has not been well characterized.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: A total of 3126 patients were treated with low dose rate 
brachytherapy from 1998 through 2010. 2464 had implant alone, and 313 had 
implant preceded by Gy supplemental external beam radiation (EBRT). 
Post-implant dosimetry was b
